title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 3.3, Phi-3, Mistral, Gemma 2, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama; chat, generate, embed, pull, list, delete models via simple API.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node & browsers; same generate/chat/embed API as Python.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration to use any Ollama model as an LLM or embeddings provider in chains & agents.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (chat UI, model manager, RAG, multi-user, dark mode).

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama; supports generate, chat, embed, pull, list, delete with async & streaming.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Rust crate providing strongly-typed async client for Ollama’s REST endpoints.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that turns any Ollama model into a GitHub Copilot replacement with inline suggestions.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration by deepset; use Ollama models as generators or embedders in Haystack pipelines.

title: ollama-cookbook
summary: Community recipes: FastAPI backend, Next.js chat, Discord bot, model quantization, GPU tweaks, etc.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Official Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU node-selector & PVC support.

title: ollama-nix
summary: Nix flake providing Ollama binary and NixOS module with CUDA/rocm enable flags.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG example: ingest PDFs → Chroma → Ollama embeddings → chat with citations.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Discord bot that streams Ollama responses in threads; slash commands, model picker, per-guild config.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Slack Bolt app that replies to @ mentions using any local Ollama model; runs in Docker.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module for CI pipelines: spin up Ollama service, pull model, run tests against LLM output.

title: ollama-qt
summary: Lightweight cross-platform Qt6 desktop GUI to chat with Ollama models offline.

title: ollama-cli-chat
summary: Terminal UI (rich + prompts) for multi-turn chat, context window display, markdown rendering.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin that adds “Ask Ollama” command to summarize notes or generate text using local models.

title: ollama-streamlit
summary: Streamlit chat app with session memory, model selector, and token-speed metrics.
